{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017094660A4AA250B42771A9873"}"},"total":2328},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7228816193787904800","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，游戏的写成这样的挺不错的，反正看了这么久的小说，番茄里游戏的这本我觉得可以排前三了，毕竟这种类型的也算比较冷门，很少人会写，写的话成绩也没有那么好，这本还算不错了，一些细节也没必要深究，又不是什么很讲究逻辑的文，看得高兴就好了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683090061,"group_id":"7019318701841189895","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好看的文都在连载","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyST34291rpn0RHj3GhCTE5kVIPl6R+Mv7Zll2LISujT","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/86aa5eeebfd8447b83d279a8468041ea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533197&x-signature=w%2FreQzIoXLd1LycdtEfd2QAQmyU%3D","user_id":"1082345600069501","user_name":"看那星如昼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1082345600069501","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7019318701841189895","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一个略微畸形的平行世界。
因为科技发展速度太快，商业和文艺的脚步完全跟不上进度。
导致这个世界大部分行业，都处于重技术，轻内容的情况。
而其中，尤其以游戏行业表现的最为明显！
没有电脑游戏，没有手机游戏，所有游戏都是VR的！
甚至连免费游戏都没有！
在这个世界，游戏是有钱人才有资格享受的昂贵物品。
“一个VR设备几十万，穷人就没资格玩游戏了？”
《传奇》《暗黑破坏神》《地下城与勇士》《梦幻西游》《魔兽世界》《英雄联盟》……
陈风带着前世无数款经典游戏穿越而来，为无数普通玩家发声做事！
一步步走到世界之巅峰，被所有玩家和网友尊称为：游戏界的慈善家！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d2cac095d870864946b2cb6420463769","author":"阿困","author_id":"","book_id":"7019318701841189895","book_name":"游戏设计师：我是做游戏，不是做慈善","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8552人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7021551948696388127","read_count":"8552","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1137341"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"431","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/46fb163c9b1a480b4eeb9cee09a0f278~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181786&x-signature=K0m37dCKrWchsaVRcs65ekPa4mI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.6452274e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017094660A4AA250B42771A9873"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6320,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":62771,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1715},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_aut
